query: SELECT department, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ingredients WHERE CAST(pricePerKgOrUnit AS DECIMAL) = 0 GROUP BY department; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_zero_price FROM ingredients WHERE CAST(pricePerKgOrUnit AS DECIMAL) = 0; SELECT name, yieldPercentage FROM final_recipes WHERE CAST(yieldPercentage AS DECIMAL) < 5; SELECT category, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ingredients GROUP BY category ORDER BY cnt DESC
